patches.hypothesis: The refined patch removes the hardcoded value and handles the missing translation file more robustly, while handling general cases and edge cases. The patch also includes proper null checks and boundary conditions to prevent further overfitting.
patches.original_hypothesis: The issue was caused by the undefined behavior of the XtbMessageBundle constructor when the translations file is not found. The code assumed that the constructor would always throw an IOException, but it actually throws a RuntimeException in this case. The test was not expecting this behavior and failed.
